title: Decision-Aligned Evaluation of Uncertainty Quantification

text.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

official_repository.paper_link_evidence: The immutable v1 PDF and TeX source link this repository in the introduction's code-availability footnote.
official_repository.commit_relation: The pinned commit predates the arXiv v1 submission by 1 day, 1 hour, and 39 minutes and was the repository's observed latest commit at acquisition time.
official_repository.acquisition_inspection: The complete tree and README were inspected. The release contains source metric implementations, benchmark and case-study preprocessing/training/evaluation scripts, visualization scripts, pyproject.toml, and uv.lock. The pinned tree contains no committed prediction, result, model, or raw/processed dataset artifacts; some case-study inputs require external downloads or an ENTSO-E API key. No empirical claim was reproduced during source acquisition.

verification.text_inspection: Non-empty extraction inspected from title, abstract, contribution statement, formal and proof sections through multiclass/multivariate experiments, recommendations, and final result tables. All 45 page-break characters are present and no UTF-8 replacement characters were found.
verification.source_archive_integrity: Archive listed successfully; it contains main_arxiv.tex, bibliography, style file, and 13 figure PDFs.

review_boundary: This record establishes immutable-v1 acquisition, successful full-text extraction, timing-aware preservation, and basic integrity/content inspection of the official release. It is not a deep review and does not establish theorem correctness, faithful result reconstruction, stakeholder utility elicitation, decision improvement, realized consequences, general metric superiority, agent capability, professional validity, production fitness, or deployment readiness.
